description: Expose check-status as a reflected CLI op and report the version gap — closes FGAP-030 + FGAP-078. Add the context-check-status op (run -> checkStatus(cwd), the existing CheckStatusReport) so the drift report is reachable from the reflecting CLI, and extend the report/render to state, per behind schema, the baseline->catalog version delta — covering content-only drift (catalog-ahead is a hash comparison; a schema can be behind with no version-number change). One surface: the checkStatus report + its render + the op entry.
acceptance_criteria: pi-context context-check-status --json returns the per-asset drift report (name, state, baseline_version, catalog_version) for every installed schema.

The report names which schemas are behind the catalog and the version delta (e.g. 1.0.0 -> 1.0.1); a content-only-drift schema (same version, different content) is reported behind with the basis stated.
The in-pi /context check-status render carries the same version-gap information (renderCheckStatus no longer drops the version fields).
checkStatus classification logic is unchanged (reporting only); build + check + full test green; parity-check exit 0; runtime demo against a catalog-ahead substrate; fresh adversarial probe.
FGAP-030 + FGAP-078 closed via verification_verifies_item + complete-task.
notes: Closes FGAP-030 + FGAP-078 (same surface: the drift report + its exposure); advances STORY-007. Independent of the other slices.
